ABC Tech Solutions, a mid-sized software development company specialising in custom software
solutions for various industries, has been approached by HealthPlus, a healthcare provider, with 20
branches in Malaysia, to develop a comprehensive patient management system (PMS). The system
aims to streamline patient data management, appointment scheduling, billing, and telemedicine
services. HealthPlus provided several key requirements for the PMS, including secure storage of patient
medical histories, an intuitive interface for booking and managing appointments, an automated billing
system with insurance processing and online payments, and a secure telemedicine feature for virtual
consultations. The system also needs to support different user roles to ensure data privacy and security,
and comply with healthcare regulations
such
as
HIPAA (Health Insurance
Portability and
Accountability Act). It is anticipated that there will be high risks with the system installation as it
involves the entire nation.
The project has a duration of 12 months and a budgel of RM500,000. The project team includes John
Smith as the Project Manager, Alice Johnson as the Lead Developer, Sarah Lee as the UL/UX Designer,
Mark Brown as the QA Specialist, and Emma White as the Business Analyst.
Answer the following questions based on the ABC Tech Solutions scenario.
